title: What is Vision-Language, OCR, and Document AI?
summary: Vision-Language Document AI replaces brittle OCR with multimodal models that jointly understand layout, text, tables, and charts, enabling agentic extraction and reasoning over complex real-world documents.
use_when: User asks for the definition, scope, or purpose of Vision-Language, OCR, and Document AI.

title: Qwen3-VL-235B and DeepSeek-VL2 (MoE 4.5B active) are the 2026 open leaders for d
